approval.approvalNote: Approved adaptive Corvus implementation plan, same-machine Local mode, E2B Cloud mode, Google account continuity, and milestone execution.

sections.purpose: Select work style, workspace scope, and Local or Cloud runtime before loading a workspace.

copy.headline: How do you want Corvus to work with you?
copy.supporting: Three short choices. Change them anytime.

sections.motionBehavior: 160ms choice and step transition; immediate under reduced motion.
sections.mobileBehavior: One-column choices with sticky Back and Continue actions.
accessibilityRisks: focus not moving after step change
sections.customJustification: Corvus needs three product decisions before it can load the correct runtime and information architecture.

sections.purpose: Compose one authorized product shell into four genuinely tailored workspaces.

copy.headline: Your Corvus workspace
copy.supporting: Work style and scope can change without moving your work.

sections.motionBehavior: Selection and status updates only; no ornamental page choreography.
sections.mobileBehavior: Compact top bar, four-item bottom navigation plus More, full-screen inspector.
sections.customJustification: Different users need distinct language and density while sharing one domain and permission model.

sections.purpose: Make Local operational and Cloud Preview accurate before identity and E2B provisioning ship.

copy.headline: Where should Corvus run?
copy.supporting: Use this computer now or review Corvus Cloud Preview.

sections.motionBehavior: Connection state announces in place without moving focus.
sections.mobileBehavior: Runtime choices stack; status and fallback remain visible without horizontal scroll.
sections.customJustification: The current desktop sidecar is Local-only, so Preview must be visually useful without claiming a Cloud connection.
failureConditions: offline edits enabled without durable queue
